narrative:
Green Creek D (precinct in Sandusky County) has 565 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points.
